data.content: Reviewed commit 3f1f81f1 on main. The implementation matches the requested agent title behavior: Claude/Codex/Gemini show a cli pill, and OpenCode model paths render vendor + model version labels with router + cli pills (for example /openrouter/mistral/devstral-2512 -> Mistral Devstral 2512 with openrouter and cli pills). Verified by code inspection plus passing tsc, unit tests, and production build on 2026-03-08.
